summary: Reduce a resource to its per-channel finite statistics (count, min, max, sum, mean, population variance) over an optional coverage mask, using a stable pairwise reduction tree so the sums are deterministic.

inputs.name: resource
inputs.doc: The resource whose per-channel statistics are computed.

inputs.name: mask
inputs.doc: An optional coverage mask: only strictly-positive-coverage pixels contribute (the whole resource when absent).

outputs.name: report
outputs.doc: The statistics report: per-channel count, min, max, sum, mean, and variance.
